examples.text: Hunden har ett ben i munnen.

notes: kept 'Mitt ben gör ont.' as leg (0); wrote a bone example for (1)
kept file example (0); wrote lane (1) and soured-milk (2) examples

examples.text: De sparar pengar i en fond.

notes: kept fund example (0); wrote a broth/stock example for (1)
dropped fragments 'trampa på gasen' and 'full gas'; wrote a gas (0) sentence and a full-sentence accelerator (1) version

examples.text: De bor på en gård på landet.

notes: dropped compound fragments 'kursgård' and 'ungdomsgård'; wrote farm (0) and yard/courtyard (1) examples

examples.text: Det partiet står långt till höger.

notes: kept spatial-right example (0); for right-wing (1) used 'står långt till höger' (political idiom) since höger as a bare adjective in the right-wing sense is normally realised as compounds like högerparti

examples.text: Jakt på älg är vanligt i Sverige.
De seglar med en stor jakt.

notes: kept hunting example (0); wrote a yacht (1) example, kept simple as this nautical sense of jakt is rare/dated

examples.text: Vilken kanal ska vi titta på?

notes: dropped fragment 'hålla diplomatiska kanaler öppna' (also above level); replaced 'TV4 är en tv-kanal' with a cleaner bare-lemma channel (1) sentence; wrote a canal (0) example
kept checkout example (0); wrote a fund/cash example for (1)

examples.text: Det finns en tydlig koppling mellan dem.

notes: dropped original connection example (fattigdom/brottslighet above A2) and wrote a simpler connection (0) sentence; wrote a clutch (1) example

examples.text: Hon tog ett kort på oss.

notes: kept card example (0); wrote a photograph (1) example

examples.text: Jag gick en kurs i spanska.

notes: kept course example (0); wrote an exchange-rate (1) example

examples.text: Det är kärnor i mitt röda äpple.

notes: kept the apple-seed example as seed (0); the avocado example is the same seed/pit sense so dropped as redundant; wrote a core/nucleus (1) example

examples.text: Han lagade cykeln på en timme.

notes: kept repair example (0); wrote a cook (1) example

examples.text: Skåne är ett landskap i söder.

notes: kept province example (0); wrote a scenery/landscape (1) example

examples.text: Jag har fått lov att vara ledig idag.

notes: dropped fragment 'att fråga om lov'; kept permission example (0); wrote a break/holiday (1) example
kept happiness example (0); wrote a luck (1) example ('lycka till')

examples.text: Vid middag står solen som högst.

notes: kept dinner example (0); wrote a noon (1) example, but note this bare 'middag = noon' sense is somewhat literary/dated (usually 'middagstid' or 'mitt på dagen' in everyday speech)

examples.text: Mitt pass på gymmet var hårt i dag.
Vi körde genom ett smalt pass.

notes: dropped compound fragments 'ett träningspass' and 'ett löppass'; wrote passport (0), session (1) and mountain-pass (2) examples

dropped fragment 'hundraser'; wrote breed (0) and collapse/landslide (1) examples. Gender note: input gender 'en' fits breed (en ras), but the collapse sense is actually neuter (ett ras) in standard Swedish, so the (1) sentence uses ett

examples.text: Det där är bara ett rykte.

notes: kept simple rumor example (0); dropped the other rumor sentence ('gömt undan pengar', slightly above level and same sense); wrote a reputation (1) example
kept hold/fit example (0), lightly trimmed 'denna bil' to 'bilen'; wrote an escape (1) example

examples.text: Vi ska gå och bada i sjön.

notes: dropped fragment 'en sjö vid en stuga'; kept lake example (0); wrote a sea (1) example using the idiom 'till sjöss'

examples.text: Han har stora skulder till banken.

notes: kept debt example (0); wrote a blame/guilt (1) example

examples.text: Hon fick ett snitt i fingret.
Jag sover sju timmar i snitt.

notes: kept cut example (0); wrote an average (1) example ('i snitt')

examples.text: Det fanns en spänning i rummet.

notes: dropped fragments 'spänningen i tråden' (ambiguous) and 'spänningar mellan öst och väst'; wrote tension (0), suspense (1) and voltage (2) examples
kept knit example (0); wrote sting/prick (1) and colloquial leave/head-off (2) examples

examples.text: Jag måste stryka skjortan innan festen.
Läraren strök en mening i texten.

notes: kept iron example (0); wrote a cross-out/delete (1) example

examples.text: Det var synd att de inte kan komma.

notes: both current sentences were the pity sense (1); kept one, trimmed to 'Det var synd att de inte kan komma.'; wrote a sin (0) example

examples.text: Det blåser en kall vind i dag.
Vi har gamla saker på vinden.

notes: kept wind example (0); wrote an attic/loft (1) example
kept wave example (0); dropped fragment 'böljande vågor'; wrote a scale (1) example
kept west example (0); wrote a vest/waistcoat (1) example

examples.text: Det är ytterst viktigt att komma i tid.

notes: kept 'ytterst i raden' as outermost (1); wrote an 'extremely/very' (0) example

examples.text: Han ramlade och slog sin ända.
Vi gick till ändan av vägen.

notes: kept buttock/behind example (0); wrote an end (1) example

examples.text: Hon har ont i ett öra.

notes: kept ear example (0); wrote a handle (1) example
kept abortion example (0), added period; wrote a miscarriage (1) example ('spontan abort' is the medical term for miscarriage; everyday word is 'missfall')

examples.text: Han har en stark anknytning till Sverige.

notes: kept connection example (0); wrote a phone-extension (1) example
kept resign example (0); wrote a depart (1) example
kept shoulder example (0); wrote axis (1) and axle (2) examples

examples.text: Vi köpte en back öl till festen.

notes: dropped current sentence ('ont i backen efter lyftet' confuses back with rygg/backe, not this word); wrote football-defender (0), reverse-gear (1) and crate (2) examples
